com.hp.workpath.api

Interface ILetObserver

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    JobService.AbstractJobletObserver

    public interface ILetObserver

    Interface ILetObserver is a generic interface to monitor the status of events changes associated with the job

    Since:
    API 1

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void onCancel(java.lang.String rid)
      Called to notify the client that the job associated with resourceId was canceled by a user or a program.
      void onComplete(java.lang.String rid, JobInfo jobInfo)
      Called to notify the client that the job completed successfully.
      void onFail(java.lang.String rid, Result result)
      Called to notify the client that the job failed to complete successfully.
      void onProgress(java.lang.String rid, JobInfo jobInfo)
      Called multiple times to notify the client that the job has been in progress depending on the nature of the job status.
      void register(android.content.Context context)
      Registers the observer to start monitoring events.
      void unregister(android.content.Context context)
      Unregisters the observer to stop monitoring events.

    • Method Detail

      • register

        void register(android.content.Context context)

        Registers the observer to start monitoring events.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context in which the application is running.
        Since:
        API 1

      • unregister

        void unregister(android.content.Context context)

        Unregisters the observer to stop monitoring events.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context in which the application is running.
        Since:
        API 1

      • onCancel

        void onCancel(java.lang.String rid)

        Called to notify the client that the job associated with resourceId was canceled by a user or a program.

        Parameters:
        rid - The triggered resourceId
        Since:
        API 1

      • onComplete

        void onComplete(java.lang.String rid,
                JobInfo jobInfo)

        Called to notify the client that the job completed successfully.

        Parameters:
        rid - The triggered resourceId
        jobInfo - The object of job details when it's completed
        Since:
        API 1

      • onProgress

        void onProgress(java.lang.String rid,
                JobInfo jobInfo)

        Called multiple times to notify the client that the job has been in progress depending on the nature of the job status.

        Parameters:
        rid - The triggered resourceId
        jobInfo - The object of job details while progressing a job
        Since:
        API 1

      • onFail

        void onFail(java.lang.String rid,
            Result result)

        Called to notify the client that the job failed to complete successfully.

        Parameters:
        rid - The triggered resourceId
        result - The details with error code and reason
        Since:
        API 1
